"use strict";
var re = /(?<year>\d{4})-(?<month>\d{2})-(?<day>\d{2})/;
var result = re.exec("2017-12-23");
expect(result.groups).toEqual({
    year: "2017",
    month: "12",
    day: "23"
});
expect(result.groups).toEqual({
    year: result[1],
    month: result[2],
    day: result[3]
});

    day: result[3]

---- [1;32mCode[0m (#48) ----
"use strict";
var re = RegExp("(\\d{4})-(\\d{2})-(\\d{2})");
var result = re.exec("2017-12-23");
expect(result.groups).toEqual({
    year: "2017",
    month: "12",
    day: "23"
});
expect(result.groups).toEqual({
    year: result[1],
    month: result[2],
    day: result[3]
});

                    UseIsNanConfig {
                        enforce_for_switch_case: None,
                        enforce_for_index_of: None,
                        check_any_cast: None,
                    },

                    Unspecified,

                        require_string_literals: None,
                    },

                    Unspecified,

"use strict";
const string = "Favorite GitHub repos: tc39/ecma262 v8/v8.dev";
const regex = /\b(?<owner>[a-z0-9]+)\/(?<repo>[a-z0-9\.]+)\b/g;
const matches = string.matchAll(regex);
expect(matches.next().value.groups).toEqual({
    owner: "tc39",
    repo: "ecma262"
});

    owner: "v8",
    repo: "v8.dev"

---- [1;32mCode[0m (#33) ----
"use strict";
const string = "Favorite GitHub repos: tc39/ecma262 v8/v8.dev";
const regex = /\b(?<owner>[a-z0-9]+)\/(?<repo>[a-z0-9\.]+)\b/g;
const matches = string.matchAll(regex);
expect(matches.next().value.groups).toEqual({
    owner: "tc39",
    repo: "ecma262"
});
expect(matches.next().value.groups).toEqual({
    owner: "v8",
    repo: "v8.dev"
});

"use strict";
const string = "Favorite GitHub repos: tc39/ecma262 v8/v8.dev";
const regex = RegExp("\\b([a-z0-9]+)\\/([a-z0-9\\.]+)\\b", "g");
const matches = string.matchAll(regex);
expect(matches.next().value.groups).toEqual({
    owner: "tc39",
    repo: "ecma262"
});
expect(matches.next().value.groups).toEqual({
    owner: "v8",
    repo: "v8.dev"
});
